nasb.text: The time that Jeroboam reigned was twenty-two years; and he slept with his fathers, and Nadab his son reigned in his place.

esv.text: And the time that Jeroboam reigned was twenty-two years. And he slept with his fathers, and Nadab his son reigned in his place.

cnv.text: 耶羅波安作王的日子共二十二年，就與他的列祖同睡。他的兒子拿答接續他作王。

ccb.text: 他做王二十二年，然后与祖先同眠。他儿子拿答继位。
